author: jsign
content: Those are the guestProgram ones --- basically the tests-zkevm@v... releases for guest programs (`statelessInputBytes`/`statelessOutputBytes`).

author: jsign
content: I'll drop later the test that should catch the situation you mentioned in today breakout call, and we can try figuring out what might be happening in your  case

author: jsign
content:
https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/bd8c673552d957dbe9c9f3f2656b87201f5ae646/tests/amsterdam/eip8025_optional_proofs/test_witness_public_keys.py#L63-L133

Those two tests should be failing if you are not checking `pubkeys` field (the easiest one to see is L63 (the first one))
